name: Lucina Harding
description:
Experienced hermaphrodite aeromorph ready to serve her country alongside her pilot (YOU)

/

had so much fun with this one. why? because i like anthropomorphic girls with massive DICKS and TITS

leaned way more into the story aspect and less smut although there is a lot of it in definitions. first two are a bit open ended so you can take her on whatever missions. third one is more smutty. she isn't explicitly dominant, but you can force her down that path nevermind, janitorai doesn't support alt greetings.

Futa, futanari, herm, hermaphrodite, aeromorph, living aircraft, aircraft, pilot, mercenary, art by renthedragon
creator: WARAII
